content: agent1: implementing escape_shell param for click.edit() in src/click/termui.py and src/click/_termui_impl.py. Will touch these two files only.

I've finished my escape_shell change (done touching edit_file's Popen line). Summary: Editor.__init__ gains escape_shell:bool=False kwarg -> self.escape_shell. In edit_file(), before the Popen call: if self.escape_shell, editor = shlex.quote each token of shlex.split(editor) joined by space, filename = shlex.quote(filename); else filename = f'"{filename}"' (preserves old behavior). Then Popen(f"{editor} {filename}", ...) (note: no more inline quotes in the f-string since quoting is now handled above). termui.edit() gains escape_shell param, passed straight through to Editor(...). Please rebase your working_dir changes on top of this - just add cwd=self.working_dir to the same Popen call. Let me know if you want me to adjust anything.
